notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cam Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Cam Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Braden Shewmake pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braden Shewmake singles on a line drive to right fielder Will Benson. Nick Allen to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Shay Whitcomb pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Shay Whitcomb singles on a line drive to right fielder Will Benson. Nick Allen scores. Braden Shewmake to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Christian Walker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker grounds into a double play, third baseman Sal Stewart to first baseman Spencer Steer. Braden Shewmake out at 3rd. Christian Walker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Christian Walker rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker grounds into a double play, third baseman Sal Stewart to first baseman Spencer Steer. Braden Shewmake out at 3rd. Christian Walker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
